title: galium trachyspermum f. hispidum
intro: Galium trachyspermum f. hispidum, also known as Prickly Barberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues, such as constipation and indigestion, due to its astringent and carminative properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate nausea, and support the immune system. Galium trachyspermum f. hispidum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
